properties.name: wikidata.user-agent
properties.description: User-Agent header for Wikidata requests. Must include contact info per Wikidata data-access policy.

properties.name: wikidata.sparql-endpoint
properties.description: SPARQL endpoint URL for Wikidata queries.

properties.name: wikidata.rest-api-base
properties.description: Wikidata MediaWiki API base URL used for wbgetentities.

properties.name: wikidata.politeness-delay-ms
properties.description: Minimum delay in milliseconds between consecutive Wikidata API calls.

properties.name: wikidata.refresh-in-days
properties.description: Number of days before a cached Wikidata entity is re-fetched.

properties.name: wikidata.brand-model-fallback-enabled
properties.description: Whether to attempt brand+model SPARQL search when GTIN lookup finds nothing.

properties.name: wikidata.max-model-candidates
properties.description: Maximum number of model candidates tried in the brand+model fallback.

properties.name: wikidata.languages
properties.description: BCP-47 language codes for which labels and descriptions are fetched from Wikidata.

properties.name: wikidata.connect-timeout-ms
properties.description: HTTP connection timeout for Wikidata API calls, in milliseconds.

properties.name: wikidata.read-timeout-ms
properties.description: HTTP read timeout for Wikidata API calls, in milliseconds.
